feature/issue-58-integrate-coderlm-adapt.task_description: Fix nf:mcp-repair to call MCP tools directly instead of via sub-agents
feature/issue-58-integrate-coderlm-adapt.approach: Refactor nf:mcp-repair to call MCP tools directly in the main conversation context instead of delegating identity/health_check/deep_health_check calls to sub-agents via the Agent tool.
out_of_scope: Refactoring the Agent tool itself or its MCP server access model
Fixing other tasks that may have similar sub-agent MCP access issues
Creating new MCP tools or extending MCP server functionality
Changing the overall architecture of how tasks are orchestrated
feature/issue-58-integrate-coderlm-adapt.risk_reason: Single-file refactor of a command workflow file (commands/nf/mcp-repair.md) to replace Task() sub-agent calls with direct MCP tool calls; workflow is complex and refactoring will exceed ~20 lines of changes.
